title: pelargonium articulatum
intro: Pelargonium articulatum, also known as Cape Geranium or Barberton Geranium, is a plant species belonging to the family Geraniaceae, characterized by its clusters of small, white or pink flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Pelargonium articulatum include relief from cold and flu symptoms, as well as its potential to help soothe sore throats and coughs. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health issues.
